work_completed: Reviewed merged PR #41 and confirmed it updated README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/development-process.md, docs/active-threads.md, and PR #40 agent-log records for Apache-2.0 package release documentation

Updated docs/development-process.md with source-verified package release-readiness commands for packages/otoi, including npm install --no-package-lock, typecheck, tests, npm pack --dry-run, dry-run tarball contents, and generated artifact cleanup
Added read-only npm registry verification commands for @neurolift-technologies/otoi and @neurolift-technologies/toi license/version metadata after an approved publish

Corrected stale validator default schema path references from nlt-otoi/tools/schemas/v1.0/personal-toi-v1.json to nlt-otoi/schemas/v1.0/personal-toi-v1.json in docs/development-process.md and docs/implementation-guide.md
Added a concise package release/license parity checklist to CONTRIBUTING.md for contributors changing packages/otoi or related release docs
Updated docs/active-threads.md to move the merged PR #41 follow-up thread to Completed and leave this branch pending review
work_in_progress: Documentation PR for cursor/engineering-documentation-updates-a154 is being opened after this handoff
decisions_made: Kept the follow-up documentation-only and updated existing runbook/contributor surfaces instead of creating a new page
Documented npm publish as a human-approved release step and npm view as read-only post-publish verification
Documented package verification from the package directory because root CI does not exercise packages/otoi build/test/pack checks
decisions_pending: Human approval remains required for any future npm publish or production release operation
handoff_record.next_agent_notes: The package check command pack was verified successfully from packages/otoi. The first validator attempt failed until jsonschema was installed, matching the documented prerequisite; rerunning after python3 -m pip install jsonschema passed. npm pack --dry-run generated ignored packages/otoi/dist and packages/otoi/node_modules artifacts, which were removed before committing.
tests_run: cd packages/otoi && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm pack --dry-run
